summary: End every session with an explicit next step, not just a completion note
problem: You write 'done' or 'feature complete' at session end, then return hours later and spend 10 minutes reconstructing what to do next
solution: Always add a 'next:' line at the end of your progress note: 'next: wire up the validation to the form submit handler in checkout.tsx'. Specific enough that you can start immediately without re-reading code
root_cause: Completion notes describe what happened; next-step notes describe what to do. They require different information and both are needed for smooth resumption
